task_description: retrieve a random cat fact from a public API
code:
import requests

response = requests.get('https://catfact.ninja/fact')
if response.status_code == 200:
    data = response.json()
    print(data['fact'])
else:
    print(f"Failed to retrieve cat fact. Status code: {response.status_code}")

trace.stdout: Cats are subject to gum disease and to dental caries. They should have their teeth cleaned by the vet or the cat dentist once a year.

execution trace:
stdout:
The earliest ancestor of the modern cat lived about 30 million years ago. Scientists called it the Proailurus, which means “first cat” in Greek. The group of animals that pet cats belong to emerged around 12 million years ago.
